description: Normative JSON Schema for DEAL Simulation Protocol v0 output.json. Every simulation output artifact MUST validate against this schema. See spec/sims/v0/README.md for the human-readable reference.

deal_sim_protocol.description: Protocol version tag. Always 'v0' for artifacts conforming to this schema.

exit_code.description: Simulation exit code. 0 = success, non-zero = failure. See README.md exit-code table.

outputs.description: Map from output parameter name to value+unit pair. Keys MUST be alphabetically sorted (D-18).

v.description: Document format version. Always 1 for DEAL Simulation Protocol v0.

title: DEAL Simulation Protocol v0 — output.json

OutputValue.description: A single simulation output value with optional unit annotation.

unit.description: Optional unit string (e.g. 'W', 'degC'). Advisory for external tools; enforced by Zig dimensional checker for Zig-internal sims.

value.description: The computed scalar value for this output parameter.

OutputValue.title: OutputValue
